query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A monochrome image showing a pale, fibrous form with swirling tonal gradations centered within a dark rectangular field, bounded by wide, light-gray margins along the left and top edges, with the brightest values concentrated in the center and darker tones toward the periphery.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily grained, intentionally blurred abstract monochrome photograph with no recognizable subject, depicting a pale fibrous mass dissolved into ambiguous texture within a dark rectangular frame. Rendered with pervasive film artifacts, a muted and faded grayscale palette, and a complete lack of fine detail, the image creates an oppressive atmosphere of atmospheric distress through its washed-out tones and shadowy, indistinct edges.
